No Poverty.reason: The course covers "生存權" (right to survival), which provides a constitutional basis for social protection systems, aligning with Target 1.3.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to hunger, food security, agriculture, or nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to health, well-being, disease prevention, or healthcare access.

Quality Education.reason: The course explicitly covers "教育基本權" (fundamental right to education), directly supporting equal access (Target 4.5). It also fosters critical thinking and core knowledge (Target 4.7).

Gender Equality.reason: The course explicitly covers "平等權" (right to equality), a fundamental legal principle for ending discrimination and promoting legislation for gender equality (Targets 5.1, 5.c).

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to water, sanitation, hygiene, or water resource management.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The mention of "生存權" (right to survival) has a very tenuous, inferred link to the protection of labor rights under Target 8.8.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to industry, infrastructure development, or innovation.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course's focus on "平等權" (right to equality) directly supports eliminating discriminatory laws and promoting social, economic, and political inclusion (Targets 10.2, 10.3).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to urban planning, housing, transport, or cultural heritage.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to consumption patterns, resource efficiency, or waste reduction.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to climate change, adaptation, or mitigation.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: As a "Constitutional Law" course, it is foundational to this goal, covering the rule of law, democratic principles, constitutional litigation, and fundamental freedoms (Targets 16.3, 16.7, 16.10).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to international cooperation, financial flows, or global partnerships.
